subject: Event Logistics Discussion
body: We finalized GreenLeaf Catering for the annual event. Expecting around 200 guests. Venue confirmed as City Convention Hall. The event date is March 15, 2026.

subject: Transport Arrangements
body: The logistics team will arrange 3 shuttle buses for guest transportation from Bangalore Airport to City Convention Hall. Pickup times: 8:00 AM, 10:00 AM, and 12:00 PM.

subject: Guest Speaker Confirmation
body: John Matthews from TechFuture has confirmed as keynote speaker for the event. His topic will be 'The Future of AI in Enterprise'. He will speak at 2:00 PM on March 15.

subject: Budget Approval
body: The total event budget of Rs. 5,00,000 has been approved by the CFO. Breakdown: Venue rental Rs. 1,50,000, Catering Rs. 2,00,000, Decorations Rs. 50,000, Marketing Rs. 50,000, Miscellaneous Rs. 50,000.

subject: Sponsorship Update
body: We have 2 confirmed sponsors: NextGen AI (Gold Sponsor - Rs. 2,00,000) and AlphaCorp (Silver Sponsor - Rs. 1,00,000). Both will have exhibition booths at the event.

subject: Security and Protocol
body: Security arrangements finalized. We will have 10 security personnel, 2 CCTV monitoring stations, and badge-based entry. VIP guests will have separate entrance via Gate B.

subject: Photography and Media Coverage
body: PixelPerfect Studios has been hired for event photography and videography. A live stream will be set up on YouTube for remote attendees. Social media coverage will be handled by marketing intern Ankit.

subject: Dress Code Announcement
body: The dress code for the annual event is Business Casual. Team leads should inform their respective teams by March 10.
